raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute a charge on my Macy 's credit card for a purchase that was delivered to an outdated address in New Jersey. I moved to New York four years prior to this purchase, and my current address is XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY XXXX. 

I have contacted your customer service multiple times regarding this issue, and I was assured that the amount would be refunded. However, a few months later, I received a bill that included the original charge, three instances of interest on it, and a late payment mark on my credit report. 

Despite my repeated explanations that the purchase was sent to an address in New Jersey where I haven't lived for years, and that I have not received any items from Macy 's, the issue remains unresolved. I have no connections in New Jersey and did not receive anything from Macy 's at that location. 

I am requesting that this charge, along with any associated fees, be completely removed from my account and my credit report, as I did not receive the purchased items and was previously informed that the refund had been processed. 

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. I look forward to your immediate resolution. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
